boundary_binding.action_boundary: May operations execute the regulated data export?
boundary_binding.allow_rule_assessment: The action boundary is not closed. The transfer release (REL-DOV-084) does not explicitly state the dataset-sensitivity class, which is a required element for closure according to STD-DOV-084-P.
boundary_binding.controlling_source_fact: Design review DES-DOV-084 warns that sensitivity class must be verified before transfer. Policy STD-DOV-084-P requires dataset-sensitivity class verification before transfer for regulated data export closure.
boundary_binding.escalate_rule_assessment: The action boundary remains open due to the missing dataset-sensitivity class verification, as required by the policy (STD-DOV-084-P) and noted in the design review (DES-DOV-084).
boundary_binding.timing_scope_authority_dependency_check: The transfer release (REL-DOV-084) is dated 2026-06-28, matching the action date, but the sensitivity class verification is a prerequisite for closure.

final_answer: The regulated data export cannot proceed because the action boundary remains open. While the transfer release (REL-DOV-084) matches most criteria, it crucially omits the dataset-sensitivity class verification. This is a mandatory requirement for closure, as stipulated by the policy (STD-DOV-084-P) and highlighted in the design review (DES-DOV-084). The lack of this verification constitutes an unresolved defect, necessitating escalation.
open_blockers: Dataset-sensitivity class verification is missing from the transfer release (REL-DOV-084) and is a required condition for closure per policy (STD-DOV-084-P).
